title: Noise cancelling headphones battery life
body: Wireless noise cancelling headphones run for 32 hours with adaptive ANC. Charge over USB-C for ten minutes to add four hours of playback.

title: Headphone fit and ear cushion support
body: Replaceable ear cushions improve comfort and passive isolation for over-ear headphones used on long flights.

title: Bluetooth codec compatibility
body: The headphones support AAC, SBC, and low latency gaming mode, but lossless codecs require a wired USB-C connection.

title: Waterproof hiking boots returns
body: Waterproof hiking boots can be returned within 45 days if the outsole is unworn. Rinse mud before shipping the return.

title: Trail boot sizing guidance
body: Choose a half size up for steep descents, thick socks, and wide toe box comfort in leather hiking boots.

title: Rain jacket waterproof rating
body: A 20000 mm waterproof shell blocks heavy rain and pairs well with breathable trail layers for wet hikes.

title: Burr grinder cleaning workflow
body: Unplug the espresso burr grinder, remove the hopper, brush fines from the burrs, and run grinder cleaning tablets monthly.

title: Espresso grinder fine adjustment
body: For espresso, adjust burrs while the grinder is running and target a fine setting that yields a 28 second shot.

title: Coffee scale for espresso dosing
body: A fast coffee scale helps dose espresso accurately and diagnose channeling during extraction.

title: USB-C laptop backpack warranty
body: The USB-C laptop backpack has a two year warranty covering seams, zippers, cable pass-through, and charging port defects.

title: Commuter backpack laptop capacity
body: The commuter backpack fits a 16 inch laptop, tablet sleeve, water bottle, and weekend clothing.

title: Power bank airline policy
body: Carry-on power banks must stay below 100 Wh and should be removed from bags during airport security screening.
